name: Hurry up Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt into a mixing bowl.
2. Add shortening.
3. Add 2/3 cup of milk and the flavoring (vanilla and lemon extract).
4. Beat until perfectly smooth using a hand whisk or electric mixer on medium speed for about 100 strokes or 2 minutes.
5. Add unbeaten egg whites and the remaining milk.
6. Beat until well blended, matching the time from step 4.
7. Pour batter into two greased and floured 8-inch round cake pans.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 to 30 minutes.
